projects.name: MainDashboard
projects.description: Project dashboard tracking all Pi and Mac projects. The thing you are looking at.
projects.last_commit_message: feat: checklist progress tracking, SSH Mac file read

projects.name: Hichord
projects.description: A React-based audio/music application, likely for chord or music interaction, built with TypeScript and Vite.
projects.last_commit_message: feat: PWA manifest, icon — Hichord v1 complete

projects.name: Project X-Ray
projects.description: A visual workflow analyzer for Claude Code agent configurations that scans project directories and renders delegation chains, hard vs soft rules, and tool access as an interactive flowchart with a prompt tracer.

projects.name: The Agency
projects.description: A real-time visual AI agent office with 42 pixel-art characters in an isometric workspace, where users send tasks via Telegram and watch a structured hierarchy of AI agents (CEO → department leads → specialists) plan and execute them using Claude Code CLI.
projects.last_commit_message: feat: CosmosBeat Mobile — loop zone redesign + instrument overhaul

projects.name: Scrap Runner
projects.description: A Mad Max-style isometric scrap collecting game where you drive a junker car through a ruined city, loot wrecks, and drag parts onto your car to upgrade it.

projects.name: Podpal
projects.description: A Go web app that lets users patch custom boot logos into Rockbox firmware for iPod devices, supporting 10 iPod models with various pixel formats.
projects.last_commit_message: Switch to IBM Plex Mono font for better readability

projects.name: Booktrix
projects.description: A terminal-style web interface for searching and downloading books from oceanofpdf.com, featuring AI-powered book summaries generated by Claude Haiku with smart PDF text extraction.

projects.name: Qobuz 90s Album Collection
projects.description: A self-contained single-page HTML app for browsing, searching, and selecting 90s albums on Qobuz, with support for filtering by genre/source, selecting albums to generate rip URLs, and permanently adding new albums via the Qobuz API.

projects.name: Zettelkasten
projects.description: A personal knowledge management and note-taking app implementing the Zettelkasten method, built as a Next.js web application with a relational database backend.
projects.last_commit_message: feat: make manual tag endpoints source-aware + document inline tag feature

projects.name: Lyst DataVault
projects.description: GDPR-compliant AI app platform for Swedish SMBs that acts as a privacy gateway, pseudonymizing PII before sending data to cloud LLMs so personal data never leaves the local network.
projects.last_commit_message: Fix app store: only filesearch installable, others show Kommer snart

projects.name: LittleWorld
projects.description: An autonomous AI civilization simulation where two AI agents (The Mayor and God) interact on a 100×100 grid world with emergent behavior, designed to run on single-board computers using local LLMs.
projects.last_commit_message: Initial commit: autonomous AI civilization simulation

projects.name: PodPal Sync
projects.description: An iOS/macOS application for syncing podcast data, built as a native Apple platform app using Swift and Xcode.
projects.last_commit_message: fix: bump deployment target to macOS 14 (@Observable requires 14+)

projects.name: PromptGen
projects.description: A Python CLI tool that converts natural language descriptions into optimized Stable Diffusion prompts in Danbooru tag format for the CyberRealistic Pony v16.0 model, using the OpenRouter API (Claude 3.5 Sonnet) for LLM-powered generation and iterative refinement.

projects.name: Game1 — Scrap Runner Map Designer
projects.description: Local 3D map designer and GLB asset library for the Scrap Runner game. Used to lay out post-apocalyptic game worlds using Three.js and export map data to a Raspberry Pi game server.

projects.name: SamVet
projects.description: A business plan and pitch for SamVet, a customer-owned veterinary cooperative in Sweden designed to compete with foreign private equity-owned clinic chains by offering transparent pricing and democratic ownership.

pending.name: ipod-ai
pending.last_commit_message: v0.7.3: Switch to Llama 3.2 1B with structured outputs

pending.name: Sandy ADHD Coach
pending.description: A Telegram bot and web dashboard that acts as an AI-powered ADHD coach, helping neurodivergent users manage tasks, track patterns, and build accountability systems using a Rust-based LLM agent framework.
pending.last_commit_message: fix(soul+zilla): restructure for quality — front-load reply rules, multi-query search

pending.name: Sandy 2 — Personal AI Assistant
pending.description: A Telegram-based personal AI assistant powered by the Claude Code SDK (Max subscription), featuring conversation memory, file system tools, email integration via ProtonMail/Hydroxide, web research, session windowing, job checkpointing, and a real-time web dashboard.

pending.name: Claude Code Telegram Bot
pending.description: A Telegram bot that enables remote control of Claude Code CLI on a Raspberry Pi, supporting task execution, project building with approval workflows, and conversation management via Telegram commands.

pending.name: Book Trend
pending.description: A Python script that fetches popular books from the Open Library API across multiple categories (Technology, Personal Finance, Self-Development, Entrepreneurship, ADHD) and generates a responsive HTML page with category tabs, book covers, ratings, and descriptions served via nginx.
